title: 消息指：阿迪達同奧度爾武漢肺炎測試呈陽性後，英超賽會將會暫停所有賽事

replies.msg:
The Premier League is set to call off all weekend matches after Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta and Chelsea forward Callum Hudson-Odoi tested positive for coronoavirus.

The league was already under pressure from clubs to suspend matches due to the likely postponement of the Euro 2020 tournament for a year. It now looks certain that the Premier League’s weekend programme will be called off after announcing an emergency meeting of clubs at 10.30 this morning.

Arsenal said following Arteta’s diagnosis that the entire first-team squad and coaching staff will self-isolate, meaning their match at Brighton on Saturday cannot go ahead. The club’s London Colney training centre has also been closed.

https://www.thetimes.co.uk/edition/sport/matches-off-after-arsenal-manager-mikel-arteta-tests-positive-for-coronavirus-jdv6f5gtq

Callum Hudson-Odoi says he is feeling fine and has recovered from coronavirus, but is self isolating, as per government advice. “As you may be aware I had the virus for the last couple of days, which I’ve recovered from. I’m following the health guidelines and self-isolating myself from everybody for the week. I hope to see everybody soon and hopefully be back on the pitch very soon.”
說好的互含聯盟呢

Looking increasingly likely the next two Premier League weekends will be postponed en-masse to give breathing space and time to reassess ahead of international break - which will have hardly any internationals. Unprecedented times.

(BBC Simon Stone)
